title: Be able to send a value from a formula column in an Email
excerpt: I want to be able to send an email to my clients using a value calculated in a Formula column

posts.author: jorgesnaptosell (Jorge Becker)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to be able to send an email to my clients using a value calculated in a Formula column

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jorgesnaptosell

If you’re still having this issue, just wanted to let you know that you could achieve this by copying the value to a normal column.

Fortunately our app Formula Pro allows you do this even though your formula has dependencies on other mirror and formula columns.

Let me know if that helps or run into any issues.

Cheers.
